en: Vindicate me, O God, and defend my cause against an ungodly people, from the deceitful and unjust man deliver me!
zh: 神啊！求你為我伸冤， 為我的案件向不敬虔的國申辯； 求你救我脫離詭詐和不義的人；

en: For you are the God in whom I take refuge; why have you rejected me? Why do I go about mourning because of the oppression of the enemy?
zh: 因為你是賜我力量的 神。 你為甚麼棄絕我呢？ 我為甚麼因仇敵的壓迫徘徊悲哀呢？

en: Send out your light and your truth; let them lead me; let them bring me to your holy hill and to your dwelling!
zh: 求你發出你的亮光和真理，好引導我， 帶我到你的聖山， 到你的居所。

en: Then I will go to the altar of God, to God my exceeding joy, and I will praise you with the lyre, O God, my God.
zh: 我就走到 神的祭壇前， 到 神、我極大的喜樂那裡。 神啊！我的 神啊！ 我要彈琴稱讚你。

en: Why are you cast down, O my soul, and why are you in turmoil within me? Hope in God; for I shall again praise him, my salvation and my God.
zh: 我的心哪！你為甚麼沮喪呢？ 為甚麼在我裡面不安呢？ 應當等候 神； 因為我還要稱讚他， 他是我面前的救助、我的 神。
